summary: Strip the entire Cookie header on cross-host redirects in the generated HTTP client instead of dropping only the hardcoded api_key cookie.
reason: The generated CheckRedirect handler stripped only a cookie named 'api_key' on cross-host redirects; a cookie-auth CLI like Placeit (session cookie 'logged_session') would not have had its session token stripped. Dropping the whole Cookie header on any cross-host hop is the correct defense-in-depth for an API client. Generator template fix tracked separately (retro).
validated_outcome: go build + go vet pass; same-host redirects unchanged; cross-host redirects now carry no cookies. Addresses Greptile P1 security finding on PR #1234.
upstream_issue: https://github.com/mvanhorn/cli-printing-press/issues (retro to be filed: generic auth-cookie strip in client redirect template)
